author: Alice
text: Should we extend the deadline for the assignment?

author: Bob
text: I think yes, because several people are behind.

author: Carol
text: I disagree. Extending it again might be unfair.

author: Dan
text: Maybe a short extension would be a compromise.

author: Eve
text: This reminds me of the earlier grading discussion.

author: Frank
text: Can you clarify what part of grading policy you mean?

author: Grace
text: I think the participation rubric is the main issue.

author: Henry
text: Replying to a missing parent on purpose.
